arts.ttl: 'Losing is never fun' - Joshua Zirkzee picks out positive from Man United defeat to Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United lost 4-3 against Tottenham in the Carabao Cup on Thursday and Joshua Zirkzee reflected on the performance.

arts.ttl: Rangers caught eye against Tottenham and Celtic but Tony Docherty only concerned by Dundee stat
arts.sum: The Dark Blues are one of the form teams in the league with four wins and a draw in their last six games

arts.ttl: What Andre Onana did after Altay Bayindir's Man United controversy speaks volumes
arts.sum: Manchester United's back-up goalkeeper Altay Bayindir had a night to forget as Tottenham Hotspur advanced to the Carabao Cup semi-finals

It turned into a testing night for Fraser, and it was put to Ange, 'Fraser Forster has been good for you, do you have to take a performance like that and put it to one side?' It should have been a lot more comfortable than it ended up being but having said that I still can’t get away from the fact this group of players is doing an unbelievable job at the moment to get us through this.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou reveals why Spurs star missed Manchester United win as selection crisis continues
arts.sum: Tottenham defied 10-man absentee list to book Liverpool semi-final showdown in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim offers update as Manchester United dealt new injury setback in Tottenham loss
arts.sum: Red Devils face anxious wait over latest fitness concern during chaotic Carabao Cup quarter-final defeat at Spurs

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists it was NOT a mistake to leave out Marcus Rashford against Tottenham after the Man United forward revealed he was 'ready for a new challenge'
arts.sum: Amorim defended his decision once again to leave Rashford out of the squad for the second game in a row despite watching his side crash out of the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 4-3 Man Utd: Player ratings as Spurs edge pulsating clash to reach Carabao Cup semi-finals
arts.sum: A Dominic Solanke brace and one from Dejan Kulusevskis had Tottenham cruising towards victory, only for Joshua Zirkzee and Amad Diallo goals to make a game of it after shocking Fraser Forster mistakes. Son Heung-min then scored direct from a corner, before Spurs conceded a third to Jonny Evans, but held onto the lead until the close.

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim defiant over Marcus Rashford omission as fans make feelings clear
arts.sum: Red Devils boss insists it was not a mistake to leave England forward out again despite chaotic Carabao Cup exit at Tottenham

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes Altay Bayindir apology claim after Manchester United crash out of Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Goalkeeper conceded directly from a corner to effectively end any Man United hopes of a comeback
